text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Step right up! Get your iced hot water<n>here!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Bubbling hot water, cooled with only the<n>iciest of
ice...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Room temperature? More like right<n>temperature!
Not too cold, but not too<n>hot! Get 'em while
they're lukewarm!
